entries.title: Android OTT and Payment Status Delivery
entries.description: Resolved an issue where the Android one-time token and payment status were not delivered to the app when using native Android SDK 2.15.0 or newer.

entries.title: Native SDK Updates
entries.description: Updated native Android SDK to version 2.17.1 and iOS SDK to version 2.18.0.

entries.title: Android SDK Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK to version 2.15.1.

entries.title: Updated Android SDK
entries.description: The native Android SDK has been updated to version 2.15.0.

entries.title: Updated iOS SDK
entries.description: The native iOS SDK has been updated to version 2.16.0.

entries.title: Android SDK Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK to version 2.13.4.

entries.title: Cross-Platform Appearance Configuration
entries.description: Added a shared appearance configuration that lets integrators customize the SDK look and feel across Android and iOS from a single setting.

entries.title: Platform-Specific Appearance Overrides
entries.description: Added platform-specific appearance settings that take priority over the shared appearance configuration, letting integrators tailor the look and feel per platform.

entries.title: Android Font Name Normalization
entries.description: Android automatically normalizes font names so integrators can reference fonts using their natural name (for example, Dancing Script).

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Native Android SDK Version Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android SDK dependency to the latest version. No API changes required.

entries.title: Hindi, Bengali, Malayalam, and Urdu Support
entries.description: Added support for Hindi, Bengali, Malayalam, and Urdu languages. No additional configuration is required to enable these languages.

entries.title: Updated Android SDK
entries.description: The native Android SDK has been updated to version 2.13.0.

entries.title: Updated iOS SDK
entries.description: The native iOS SDK has been updated to version 2.14.1.

entries.title: Native SDK Versions Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android and iOS SDK dependencies to their latest versions. No API changes required.

entries.title: Transparent Button Colors
entries.description: Fixed an issue where button colors appeared as clear or transparent when not explicitly configured.

entries.title: Dependency Updates
entries.description: Updated internal dependencies to resolve compatibility conflicts. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Updated Android SDK
entries.description: The native Android SDK has been updated to version 2.10.0.

entries.title: Updated iOS SDK
entries.description: The native iOS SDK has been updated to version 2.11.1.

entries.title: Updated Android SDK
entries.description: The native Android SDK has been updated to version 2.8.1.

entries.title: Updated iOS SDK
entries.description: The native iOS SDK has been updated to version 2.9.0.

entries.title: Kotlin 2.x Compatibility
entries.description: Fixed Android compatibility with Kotlin 2.x and the Compose Compiler plugin.

entries.title: Android SDK Version Correction
entries.description: Corrected the native Android SDK version to 2.6.5.

entries.title: Native SDK Versions Update
entries.description: Updated the native Android and iOS SDK dependencies to their latest versions.
